ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

document_a.quality_assessment: Good. Text-based PDF with clear fields and structured layout.

document_b.quality_assessment: Good. Scanned but clearly legible. All fields readable.

criteria_met: Certifikatets consignor 'FORPAC INTERNATIONAL AB' kan identifieras i fakturan som Seller 'Forpac International AB'.
criteria_not_met: Certifikatets fakturanummer '1003009' matchar INTE fakturans fakturanummer '1002962'.
Certifikatets consignee 'NAPACK' kan INTE identifieras i fakturan. Fakturan anger 'Praxis Comercial SAC'.
pairing_validation.result: PASS — minst ett kriterium uppfyllt (consignor identifierad i fakturan).

lc_check.motivation: No LC reference found in certificate. Box 5 contains 'ORDER REF: 2721' and 'INVOICE N° 1003009'. Neither constitutes a Letter of Credit reference.

locations.context: Seller block: 'Forpac International AB, Kungsporten 4E, 427 50 Billdal, Sweden'

candidates.raw_text: 4 RUE NABEUL ZONE INDUSTRIELLE MGHIRA II, 2082 FOUCHANA, BEN AROUS
candidates.normalized_text: 4 rue nabeul zone industrielle mghira ii, 2082 fouchana, ben arous

candidates.raw_text: Avenida Oscar R Benavides N 861, Lima 1 Lima, Peru
candidates.normalized_text: avenida oscar r benavides n 861, lima 1 lima, peru

candidates.raw_text: Avenida Oscar R Benavides N 861, Lima 1 Lima, Peru
candidates.normalized_text: avenida oscar r benavides n 861, lima 1 lima, peru

candidates.raw_text: Natural Kraft Extensible 80 gsm (multiple rows); Natural Kraft Bag 49 gsm (multiple rows)
candidates.normalized_text: natural kraft extensible 80 gsm; natural kraft bag 49 gsm

candidates.raw_text: Outside Community supply of goods, article 146 Council Directive 2006/112/EC
candidates.normalized_text: outside community supply of goods, article 146 council directive 2006/112/ec

consignor.certificate_value: FORPAC INTERNATIONAL AB, KUNGSPORTEN 4E, SE-427 50, BILLDAL, SWEDEN
consignor.invoice_value: Forpac International AB, Kungsporten 4E, 427 50 Billdal, Sweden (Seller block)

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name in all invoice files.
comparison_steps.result: FOUND. 'FORPAC INTERNATIONAL AB' found in invoice header/branding as 'FORPAC international ab.' and in Seller block as 'Forpac International AB'. Direct match after normalization of case and punctuation.

comparison_steps.description: Verify company name matches.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH. Certificate: 'FORPAC INTERNATIONAL AB'. Invoice Seller: 'Forpac International AB'. After case normalization, these are identical.

comparison_steps.description: Verify country matches.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH. Certificate: 'SWEDEN'. Invoice Seller block: 'Sweden'. Identical after case normalization.

rules_applied.description: Corporate structure — consignor name found in invoice seller block.
Company name verification — exact match after case normalization.

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor is 'FORPAC INTERNATIONAL AB' at 'KUNGSPORTEN 4E, SE-427 50, BILLDAL, SWEDEN'. Invoice seller block states 'Forpac International AB, Kungsporten 4E, 427 50 Billdal, Sweden'. Company name is identical after case normalization. Address matches (SE- prefix on postcode is minor formatting). Country is Sweden in both. MATCH per rules 4.1.0 and 4.1.2.

consignee.certificate_value: NAPACK, 4 RUE NABEUL ZONE INDUSTRIELLE MGHIRA II, 2082 FOUCHANA, BEN AROUS, Tunisia
consignee.invoice_value: Buyer: Praxis Comercial SAC, Peru; Consignee: Praxis Comercial SAC, Peru

comparison_steps.description: Search for certificate consignee 'NAPACK' in invoice primary billing fields (Buyer, Consignee).
comparison_steps.result: NOT FOUND. Invoice Buyer = 'Praxis Comercial SAC' (Peru). Invoice Consignee = 'Praxis Comercial SAC' (Peru). Neither is 'NAPACK'.

comparison_steps.step: 4.2.0.2 Priority 2 - Secondary fields (Ship To, Delivery Address)
comparison_steps.description: Search for 'NAPACK' in secondary delivery fields.
comparison_steps.result: NOT FOUND. No Ship To or Delivery Address field in invoice. No occurrence of 'NAPACK' anywhere in invoice text.

comparison_steps.description: Search for 'NAPACK' anywhere in invoice including header, footer, VAT blocks, addresses.
comparison_steps.result: NOT FOUND. The string 'NAPACK' does not appear anywhere in the invoice.

comparison_steps.description: Check if NAPACK appears in a Ship-To field.
comparison_steps.result: NOT APPLICABLE. Invoice has no Ship-To field and 'NAPACK' is entirely absent from the invoice.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate consignee country is 'Tunisia'. Invoice Buyer/Consignee country is 'Peru'.
comparison_steps.result: MISMATCH. Tunisia ≠ Peru.

rules_applied.description: Priority order for consignee identification — searched primary and secondary fields.
Corporate structure / dealer search — NAPACK not found anywhere in invoice.
Country check — Tunisia vs Peru = MISMATCH.

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee is 'NAPACK' in Tunisia. Invoice has Buyer 'Praxis Comercial SAC' in Peru and Consignee 'Praxis Comercial SAC' in Peru. The name 'NAPACK' does not appear anywhere in the invoice — not in any field, header, footer, address block, or any other text. The country also mismatches completely: Tunisia vs Peru. These are clearly different parties on different continents. This is a definitive MISMATCH: the consignee in the certificate cannot be identified in the invoice at all.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: NAPACK might be a subsidiary or trading name of Praxis Comercial SAC
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: No evidence of any relationship. Different names, different countries (Tunisia vs Peru). Rule 4.1.3.1 (applicable to consignee via 4.2) prohibits assuming corporate relationships without explicit evidence.

goods_description.invoice_value: 28 Reel: Natural Kraft Extensible 80 gsm; Natural Kraft Bag 49 gsm

comparison_steps.description: Check if article numbers are present in certificate.
comparison_steps.result: NOT APPLICABLE. Certificate does not contain article numbers.

comparison_steps.description: Identify the identity-bearing main designation in certificate and search for it in invoice.
comparison_steps.result: MISMATCH. Certificate's identity-bearing main designations are 'FLUTING' and 'TESTLINER'. Invoice describes goods as 'Natural Kraft Extensible 80 gsm' and 'Natural Kraft Bag 49 gsm'. Neither 'FLUTING' nor 'TESTLINER' appears anywhere in the invoice text. These are different product designations.

comparison_steps.description: Check if invoice uses abbreviations that could correspond to certificate's product names.
comparison_steps.result: NOT APPLICABLE. Invoice uses full descriptions ('Natural Kraft Extensible', 'Natural Kraft Bag'), not abbreviations. Neither term corresponds to 'Fluting' or 'Testliner' via any allowed normalization.

comparison_steps.step: 4.3.5 Priority 3 - Generic description with invoice reference
comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate uses generic description with valid invoice reference.
comparison_steps.result: The certificate references 'INVOICE N° 1003009' but the invoice number is '1002962'. The invoice reference does NOT match. Additionally, order ref in certificate is '2721' while invoice 'Our ref' is '2725'. Neither reference matches. Cannot apply Priority 3.

rules_applied.description: Controlled text matching — identity-bearing designations 'FLUTING' and 'TESTLINER' not found in invoice.
Generic description with invoice reference — invoice number mismatch (1003009 vs 1002962).

evidence.raw_text: Natural Kraft Extensible 80 gsm; Natural Kraft Bag 49 gsm

goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate describes goods as 'FLUTING & TESTLINER' (73 reels). Invoice describes goods as 'Natural Kraft Extensible 80 gsm' and 'Natural Kraft Bag 49 gsm' (28 reels). The terms 'Fluting' and 'Testliner' do not appear anywhere in the invoice. While in the paper industry 'Fluting' and 'Testliner' are specific product types related to kraft paper, matching these to 'Natural Kraft Extensible' and 'Natural Kraft Bag' would require semantic/industry interpretation, which is prohibited under rule 4.3.3. Additionally, the number of reels differs (73 vs 28). Furthermore, the invoice number referenced in the certificate (1003009) does not match the invoice's actual number (1002962), and the order reference also differs (2721 vs 2725). This is a clear MISMATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Fluting and Testliner might be industry synonyms for Natural Kraft Extensible and Natural Kraft Bag
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Rule 4.3.3 explicitly prohibits semantic/industry interpretation, synonymy, or branch-specific matching. The identity-bearing designations must be identifiable in the invoice text without interpretation.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Certificate might use generic description covered by Priority 3
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Priority 3 requires matching invoice reference. Certificate references invoice 1003009 but the invoice number is 1002962. Order ref also mismatches (2721 vs 2725). Priority 3 cannot be applied.

quantity.invoice_value: 28 Reel 23,861 MT (Total qty); individual rows sum to 23.861 MT

comparison_steps.description: Box 7 contains '187,905 MT/GW'. This is the verification-grounding quantity per rule 4.4.2.1.
comparison_steps.result: Verification quantity: 187.905 MT GW.

comparison_steps.description: Search for 187.905 MT (or equivalent) in invoice.
comparison_steps.result: NOT FOUND. Invoice total is 23.861 MT (28 Reels). 187.905 does not appear anywhere in the invoice.

comparison_steps.description: 187.905 MT = 187,905 KG. Search for 187905 KG in invoice.
comparison_steps.result: NOT FOUND. Invoice does not contain 187,905 KG anywhere.

comparison_steps.description: Box 6 states 'TOTAL 73 REELS'. Invoice total states '28 Reel'. 73 ≠ 28.
comparison_steps.result: MISMATCH. Reel count differs: 73 vs 28.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 187.905 MT GW. Invoice total: 23.861 MT. Difference: 164.044 MT. This is a massive discrepancy (approximately 688% of invoice value).
comparison_steps.result: MISMATCH. Values are completely different — not a tolerance issue.

rules_applied.description: Box 7 value (187,905 MT/GW) is the verification-grounding quantity.
Direct identification failed — 187.905 MT not found in invoice.
Multiple quantities — tried both weight and reel count, neither matches.

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate Box 7 states '187,905 MT/GW'. Using European decimal notation, this is 187.905 metric tons gross weight. Invoice total quantity line states '28 Reel 23,861 MT' which is 23.861 metric tons. The weight differs enormously: 187.905 MT vs 23.861 MT. The reel count also differs: certificate states 73 reels, invoice states 28 reels. No exception (3A-3E) can reconcile these values. This is a clear MISMATCH — the certificate and invoice describe entirely different shipments in terms of quantity.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The comma in 187,905 might be a thousands separator (187,905 = 187905 MT)
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Even if interpreted as 187,905 MT (thousands separator), this still does not appear in the invoice. Invoice total is 23,861 MT regardless of notation interpretation.

comparison_steps.description: Search for origin field in invoice.
comparison_steps.result: FOUND. Invoice has explicit 'Country of origin' field stating 'North America'.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 'FRANCE'. Invoice: 'North America'. These are not the same after any allowed normalization. France is a European country; North America is a continent (not a country) that includes USA, Canada, Mexico. France is not in North America.
comparison_steps.result: MISMATCH. FRANCE ≠ North America.

comparison_steps.description: Check if EU normalization applies.
comparison_steps.result: NOT APPLICABLE. Certificate states 'FRANCE' (specific country), not 'EU'. Invoice states 'North America', which is not an EU member state or EU designation.

comparison_steps.description: France is an EU member state. Does invoice state 'EU' or 'European Union'?
comparison_steps.result: NO. Invoice states 'North America'. This is not equivalent to EU or any EU member state.

rules_applied.description: Origin field identified in invoice as 'North America'.
Normalization attempted — France and North America are not equivalent under any allowed normalization.

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate Box 3 states 'FRANCE' as country of origin. Invoice explicitly states 'Country of origin: North America'. France is a country in Europe; North America is a continent comprising the USA, Canada, Mexico and other countries. France is not located in or part of North America. No normalization rule can equate these. The invoice's port of loading is Seattle (USA), consistent with North American origin, which further confirms the discrepancy. This is a definitive MISMATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: North America might include overseas territories of France (e.g., Saint Pierre and Miquelon)
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: This would require geographic/political interpretation not permitted under rule 4.5. 'North America' as stated in the invoice is not equivalent to 'France' under any allowed normalization. Additionally, the intent of the invoice is clearly USA/Canada-originated goods given port of loading Seattle.

rule_evaluation_log.result: NOT ACTIVATED. No LC reference in certificate.
Document A identified as certificate (COO from ICC/West Sweden Chamber). Document B identified as invoice (Forpac International AB). Pairing established.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Invoice reference in certificate vs invoice file
rule_evaluation_log.result: CRITICAL FINDING: Certificate references invoice N° 1003009. Invoice file contains invoice no. 1002962. These do NOT match. However, consignor (Forpac International AB) matches between certificate and invoice, so pairing validation passes per rule 8.6 criterion 2. The invoice number mismatch is a strong indicator that this certificate and this invoice do NOT belong to the same transaction.

PASS. Criterion 2 met: Consignor 'Forpac International AB' identified in invoice. However, criterion 1 (invoice number) and criterion 3 (consignee) both FAIL. This pairing is weak — only consignor matches.
MATCH. 'FORPAC INTERNATIONAL AB' found in invoice seller block and header.
MISMATCH. Certificate consignee 'NAPACK' (Tunisia) not found in any invoice field. Invoice has 'Praxis Comercial SAC' (Peru).
MISMATCH. 'FLUTING' and 'TESTLINER' not found in invoice. Invoice describes 'Natural Kraft Extensible' and 'Natural Kraft Bag'.
MISMATCH. 187.905 MT not found in invoice. Invoice total is 23.861 MT.
MISMATCH. Certificate: FRANCE. Invoice: North America.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Certifikatet och fakturan avser helt olika försändelser. Certifikatet anger mottagaren NAPACK i Tunisien medan fakturan är ställd till Praxis Comercial SAC i Peru. Ursprungslandet i certifikatet är Frankrike men fakturan anger North America. Varubeskrivningen skiljer sig (Fluting & Testliner vs Natural Kraft), kvantiteten skiljer sig (187,9 MT vs 23,9 MT) och fakturanumret i certifikatet (1003009) matchar inte fakturans nummer (1002962).
overall_assessment.summary: NOT_IDENTICAL: 4 of 5 checkpoints are MISMATCH. Only consignor matches (same company: Forpac International AB, Sweden). The certificate and invoice clearly pertain to entirely different transactions — different consignees (NAPACK/Tunisia vs Praxis Comercial SAC/Peru), different goods (Fluting & Testliner vs Natural Kraft), different quantities (187.905 MT vs 23.861 MT, 73 reels vs 28 reels), different origins (France vs North America), and different invoice numbers (1003009 vs 1002962). The only shared element is the seller/consignor Forpac International AB.
blocking_issues: Consignee MISMATCH: Certificate states NAPACK (Tunisia), invoice states Praxis Comercial SAC (Peru).
Goods description MISMATCH: Certificate states Fluting & Testliner (73 reels), invoice states Natural Kraft products (28 reels).
Quantity MISMATCH: Certificate states 187.905 MT/GW, invoice states 23.861 MT total.
Country of origin MISMATCH: Certificate states France, invoice states North America.
Invoice number mismatch: Certificate references invoice 1003009, but invoice number is 1002962.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.certificate_value: FORPAC INTERNATIONAL AB, KUNGSPORTEN 4E, SE-427 50, BILLDAL, SWEDEN
sections.invoice_value: Forpac International AB, Kungsporten 4E, 427 50 Billdal, Sweden
sections.rule_applied: Direkt namnmatchning efter normalisering av versaler/gemener. Företagsnamn och land identiska.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'FORPAC INTERNATIONAL AB' i Sverige kan identifieras i fakturans seller-block som 'Forpac International AB' i Sverige. Företagsnamn och land överensstämmer exakt efter tillåten normalisering av versaler/gemener. Adress (Kungsporten 4E, Billdal) överensstämmer.

sections.certificate_value: NAPACK, 4 RUE NABEUL ZONE INDUSTRIELLE MGHIRA II, 2082 FOUCHANA, BEN AROUS, Tunisia
sections.invoice_value: Buyer: Praxis Comercial SAC, Avenida Oscar R Benavides N 861, Lima, Peru; Consignee: Praxis Comercial SAC, Peru
sections.rule_applied: Mottagarens företagsnamn 'NAPACK' kan inte identifieras i fakturan. Fakturan anger 'Praxis Comercial SAC' som köpare och consignee. Land skiljer sig: Tunisien vs Peru.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare är 'NAPACK' i Tunisien. Fakturans köpare och consignee är 'Praxis Comercial SAC' i Peru. 'NAPACK' förekommer inte någonstans i fakturan. Landet skiljer sig helt (Tunisien vs Peru). Dessa är olika juridiska parter i olika länder. MISMATCH.

sections.invoice_value: Natural Kraft Extensible 80 gsm; Natural Kraft Bag 49 gsm (28 Reels)
sections.rule_applied: Kontrollerad textmatchning. De identitetsbärande huvudbeteckningarna 'FLUTING' och 'TESTLINER' kan inte identifieras i fakturans varubeskrivning.
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger 'FLUTING & TESTLINER' (73 rullar). Fakturan anger 'Natural Kraft Extensible 80 gsm' och 'Natural Kraft Bag 49 gsm' (28 rullar). Varken 'Fluting' eller 'Testliner' förekommer i fakturan. Att likställa dessa termer skulle kräva branschmässig tolkning som inte är tillåten. Dessutom matchar inte fakturanumret: certifikatet hänvisar till faktura 1003009 men denna faktura har nummer 1002962. MISMATCH.

sections.rule_applied: Direkt förekomstkontroll. Varken viktuppgiften (187,905 MT vs 23,861 MT) eller antal rullar (73 vs 28) överensstämmer.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets Box 7 anger 187,905 MT/GW. Fakturans total anger 23,861 MT (28 rullar). Vikten skiljer sig med ca 164 MT (certifikatet är nästan 8 gånger tyngre). Antal rullar skiljer sig: 73 vs 28. Inget undantag (3A–3E) kan tillämpas. MISMATCH.

sections.rule_applied: Direkt landverifiering. 'FRANCE' kan inte identifieras som 'North America' efter normalisering.
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger 'FRANCE' som ursprungsland. Fakturan anger 'North America' som Country of origin. Frankrike är ett land i Europa, North America är en kontinent som inkluderar USA, Kanada och Mexiko. Ingen tillåten normalisering kan likställa dessa. EU-normalisering är inte tillämplig eftersom fakturan inte anger EU eller ett EU-land. MISMATCH.

output_quality_checks.notes: 4 of 5 checkpoints are MISMATCH. Comparison result correctly set to NOT_IDENTICAL. Only consignor matches. This certificate and invoice clearly pertain to entirely different commercial transactions from the same seller (Forpac International AB).
